infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Sovern Ops uses the microphone for voice input in the AI Assistant chat.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Sovern Ops uses speech recognition to transcribe what you say into the AI Assistant chat.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Sovern Ops uses the camera to capture receipts and documents that you share with the AI Assistant.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Sovern Ops accesses your photo library so you can attach images to the AI Assistant chat.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Sovern Ops to access your photos so you can attach images to the AI Assistant.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Sovern Ops to use the camera to capture receipts and documents.
